title: Bloome 4pk Incense Stick Holders with 200x Assorted Fragranced Incense Sticks 4x50pk in Strawberry, Apple, Cherry & Sandalwood - Fruity & Cosy - Brighten Space, Mood, Ease Stress & Support Mindfulness
features: Uplift Every Moment with Scent – Dive into a 200-piece incense sticks multipack featuring 50 each of cherry, apple, strawberry and soothing sandalwood incense sticks. Brighten your space & mood with this energising mix of fruity and grounding aromas.

Soothe & Centre Your Mind – Whether you need meditation incense sticks, positive vibes incense sticks, or a relaxing escape, this sandalwood incense sticks pack provides grounding fragrance to ease stress & support mindfulness in your daily rituals.

A Gift of Scents & Serenity – Complete gift set includes 4 incense stick holders & 200 fragrance sticks, making it the ideal gift set for self-care lovers, spiritual souls, or festive gifting like Christmas incense sticks and xmas incense sticks.

Cosy Scents for the Season – With fruity freshness and warm sandalwood incense, this set brings festive comfort. A heart-warming xmas incense sticks and christmas insensé sticks pick to make your home smell magical during the holiday season.

Designed to Delight the Senses – From fruity insensé sticks to classic sandalwood incense, each stick is made to refresh, reset, and recharge. Great for creating atmosphere, rituals, or enhancing décor with this all-in-one insensé sticks set.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Shop Our Product Range Incense Sticks w/ Holders Add To Basket 12pk Dehumidifier Bags Buying Options 24pk Dehumidifier Bags Add To Basket 12 Interior Dehumidifiers Add To Basket 24 Interior Dehumidifiers Add To Basket Customer Reviews 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.1 out of 5 stars 709 4.0 out of 5 stars 179 3.6 out of 5 stars 19 4.3 out of 5 stars 3 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 — £7.79 £ 7 . 79 £14.89 £ 14 . 89 £22.89 £ 22 . 89 Suitable for Any Space ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ No Electricity Required ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact Design ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Daily Freshness Support ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What scents are included in this incense sticks multipack? This set features four uplifting scents: green apple, Indian sandalwood, sweet cherry, and garden strawberry. Each offers a distinct aroma to match your mood or the moment. How can I use these incense sticks in my daily routine? Light a stick during meditation, self-care, or to refresh a room. These meditation incense sticks help ease stress, boost positive vibes, and create a calm atmosphere. Is this incense sticks gift set suitable for seasonal use? Yes! The fruity and warm notes make it a perfect Christmas incense choice. Use as xmas incense sticks or share it as a festive incense gift set to delight the senses. What makes this incense set ideal for home ambience? With 200 fragrance sticks and 4 holders, this insensé sticks set is perfect for enhancing décor, uplifting mood, and refreshing any space with long-lasting, joyful scent. Do the incense holders come with the set, and how are they used? Yes, you’ll receive 4 wooden incense stick holders. Simply place the incense stick into the holder, light the tip, blow out the flame, and enjoy the slow-releasing aroma.
